zh.Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton I於大約1162年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾。他於1186年之前與Ukn Maiden在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1256年享年95歲。

zh-hans.Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Englan: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton I于大约1162年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾納普頓 奧 馮 希爾。他于1186年之前与Ukn Maiden在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1256年享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Broughton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England called Broughton. The first element is variously Old English brōc ‘brook’, burg ‘fortress’, or beorg ‘hill, mound’; the second is in all cases Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Braughton
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Broughton  .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
meanings: Hebrew: The Scripture name, in Hebrew, Adham, signifying 'man;' literally earthy, red earth; Rudolph, however, says the name in Ethiopic means ' to be fair, beautiful.' Hence the nurse-name Addy, little Adam.

en.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton I was born about 1162, in Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Ukn Maiden before 1186, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1256, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton I est né environ 1162, à Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Ukn Maiden avant 1186, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1256, à l’âge de 95 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton I è nato il circa 1162 nel Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Ukn Maiden prima del 1186, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1256, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Englan: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアナプトン オン ス ヒル
ja.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton Iは約1162年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアナプトン オン ス ヒルで生まれた。1186年以前にイギリスでUkn Maidenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1256年に95歳で死去した。

ko.Napton on the Hill, Warwickshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 나프턴  테 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton I(은)는 대략 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 나프턴  테 힐에서 태어났다. 그는 1186년 이전 영국에서 Ukn Maiden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1256년 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Adam de Broughton I родился около 1162 г. в местности наптон он т хилл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Ukn Maiden перед 1186 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1256 г. в возрасте 95 лет.
